3334980.name: PixelPop 2087
3334980.description:
PixelPop 2087

When the spirit of the 80s is so powerful it shapes the entire world, magic and technology collide in a post-futuristic 2087!

An action 2D game with rogue-lite inspired mechanics, where you can choose between two characters with completely different combat styles:

  • Elly, a melee fighter who masters close combat weapons.

  • Johnny, a gunslinger who relies on firepower.

Fight your way through, collect new weapons, and defeat your enemies...  or avoid combat altogether. Get the keys, unlock new rooms and push deeper into the fortress to rescue your partner. The choice between action and evasion is yours!

The Story

A Dark Mage has kidnapped your partner for the color of their eyes, a crucial ingredient in a forbidden ritual... . To save them, you must venture into a shifting fortress, where every room changes configuration and danger lurks at every corner. Welcome to PixelPop 2087!
